name: Sweet Potato Spice Bread
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Oil a 9-inch x 5-inch x 3-inch loaf pan.
In a large bowl, blend molasses, honey, mashed sweet potatoes, oil, and beaten eggs.
In a small bowl, combine remaining ingredients. Add to potato mixture and stir until well mixed.
Spoon batter into loaf pan and bake until a toothpick inserted in the middle comes out clean, about one hour. Turn out onto a wire rack to cool before slicing.
Hint: Serve it with nonfat cream cheese.
